title: Crazy Craft Modded SMP
description: A modpack ready to use for our Crazy Craft Modded SMP.
body:
## Crazy Craft Modded SMP – Base Modpack

**Basic starter pack for the Crazy Craft Modded SMP!**

We built this **small, easy-to-use modpack** so our community can hop in without hunting down the right mods, just install and play!

> ⚠️ **Under Construction**
> This is **only the base** of the future Crazy Craft Modded SMP modpack.
> Additional gameplay mods are **not yet included** and will be added as the project grows.

---

### ✨ Why download this modpack?

Perfect for survival play alone or with friends:

- ⚡ **Optimized performance** – fast loading and stable FPS
- 🧩 **Flexible playstyles** – survival, adventure, building, events and more

---

### 🛠️ Mods Included

**Performance & Graphics**

- sodium, sodium-extra, lithium, ferritecore
- BetterF3 for a cleaner debug screen
- Bobby for improved distant rendering

**Quality of Life & Utility**

* BetterAdvancements, BetterStats
* Litematica, MaLiLib, MiniHUD, Peek (schematic helpers & info)
* LambdaDynamicLights, Status, Tablist Health Indicator
* ReplayMod, ReplayVoiceChat, VoiceChat
* ModMenu, Architectury, Fabric API, Cloth Config, Placeholder API, TCDCommons

**Sound & Atmosphere**

- Sound Physics Remastered for immersive audio
- Iris (for shaders)

---

### 🗺️ Crazy Craft Modded SMP

Extra features planned for our **Modded SMP** server: *(Not included in this base modpack)*

**Datapacks & Gamerules (planned)**

- 🔥 `firetick` off on all servers
- 🌙 Only **1 player needs to sleep** to skip the night
- 📍 Coordinates with `/trigger ch_toggle`
- 🛡️ **Anti-enderman grief** enabled
- 🌀 **Custom nether portals**
- 💀 **Mob heads & mini blocks** collectible
- 🍂 **Fast leaf decay & graves** enabled

---

### 💻 How to join

The Crazy Craft Modded SMP is **whitelist-only**.
[Join our Disord](https://discord.gg/McRSnK3agZ) to request access and follow updates as new mods are added.

---

💡 **Note**

This is the **official base pack** for the Crazy Craft Modded SMP.
It’s perfect for early setup or private worlds, and it will grow into the **full modded experience** as the SMP evolves.
